samples.titleZh: 李明德 · 一位教师的共和国
samples.dedicationZh: 献给我们敬爱的父亲、丈夫与祖父 —— 李明德
samples.dedicationEn: For our beloved father, husband, and grandfather — Li Mingde

blocks.zh: 李明德
blocks.en: Li Mingde

blocks.zh: 春蚕到死丝尽，蜡炬成灰泪始干
blocks.en: Until the spring silkworm dies, its thread is spun; until the candle burns out, its tears run dry.

blocks.zh: 父亲一生最骄傲的身份，不是职称，不是著作，而是「李老师」这三个字。学生们来信说，他们至今记得他朗读《春望》时停顿的那一秒。
blocks.en: The title Father was proudest of was not a rank or a book — it was Mr. Li. Former students still write that they remember the pause before he read Du Fu aloud.

blocks.zh: —— 长子 李伟
blocks.en: — Li Wei, eldest son

blocks.zh: 1938年，父亲生于苏州一条临水的小巷。祖父修钟表，祖母替人誊抄典籍。物质匮乏，精神却富足。
blocks.en: Born in 1938 in a canal-side lane in Suzhou. His father repaired clocks; his mother copied classical texts for neighbors. Material life was thin; the inner life was rich.

blocks.zh: 他常替书铺跑腿换借阅卡，煤油灯下读到管理员关门才肯回家。
blocks.en: He ran errands for library cards and read by kerosene until the librarian sent him home.

blocks.zh: 1962年入职长沙一中，讲授唐宋诗词。他要求每周背诵十句，不是刁难，而是相信诗句会在某个雨天自己回来。
blocks.en: From 1962 he taught Tang and Song poetry at Changsha No. 1 Middle School. Ten lines memorized each week — not cruelty, but faith that the lines would return on some rainy day.

blocks.zh: 1985年出版散文集《庭前落叶》，稿费全买了班级图书角。
blocks.en: In 1985 he published Leaves in the Courtyard; the royalties bought books for the class corner.

blocks.zh: 1968年与母亲陈美华成婚。后院种玫瑰，猫趴在《陶渊明集》上睡觉。周末厨房飘着墨香与桂花糕的味道。
blocks.en: He married Chen Meihua in 1968. Roses in the yard; the cat slept on Tao Yuanming. Weekends smelled of ink and osmanthus cake.

blocks.zh: 妹妹李芳说：「爸从不大声说话，但家里每一扇窗都因为他而亮。」
blocks.en: His daughter Fang said: "Father never raised his voice, yet every window in the house seemed lit because of him."

blocks.zh: 「您教会我的不是考点，而是如何在乱世里仍读一首诗。」
blocks.en: "You did not teach me exam points — you taught me how to read a poem when the world is in turmoil."

blocks.zh: 「退休二十年，我仍能在梦里听见您敲黑板的三下。」
blocks.en: "Twenty years after your retirement, I still hear your three knocks on the board in dreams."

blocks.zh: 退休后与母亲每周日逛颐和园。他扫描家书、批改旧生的论文，说「教书人不退休，只是换一间教室」。
blocks.en: Retired, he walked the Summer Palace every Sunday with his wife. He scanned family letters and edited old students' drafts: "Teachers do not retire — they change classrooms."

blocks.zh: 2024年深秋，父亲在家中安详离世，握着母亲的手。最后念的是王维：「空山不见人，但闻人语响。」
blocks.en: In autumn 2024 he passed at home, holding his wife's hand, murmuring Wang Wei: empty mountains, no one seen — only the echo of voices.

blocks.zh: 这本册子由家人与学生在念归处共同整理。愿读者翻页时，仿佛仍坐在他的教室后排。
blocks.en: This book was compiled by family and students on Nianguichu. May each turn of the page feel like the back row of his classroom.

samples.titleZh: 陈美华 · 最好的园丁
samples.dedicationZh: 献给我们的母亲、祖母 —— 陈美华
samples.dedicationEn: For our mother and grandmother — Chen Meihua

blocks.zh: 陈美华
blocks.en: Chen Meihua

blocks.zh: 花开有时，爱无绝期
blocks.en: Blossoms have their season; love does not end

blocks.zh: 母亲总说，花不会说话，但最懂人心。她在南城小院种了四十年玫瑰、月季与薄荷。
blocks.en: Mother said flowers do not speak, yet they understand us. For forty years she tended roses, tea roses, and mint in the southern courtyard.

blocks.zh: 邻居来讨一枝，她必剪去刺，用旧报纸包好，附一张手写养护卡。
blocks.en: When neighbors asked for a stem, she stripped the thorns, wrapped it in newsprint, and added a handwritten care note.

blocks.zh: 青年时在县医院做护士，夜班后仍回家给三个孩子缝校服。她说：「疼要有人听见，才算被照顾。」
blocks.en: As a young county nurse, she sewed uniforms after night shifts. "Pain must be heard to be cared for," she said.

blocks.zh: 她与李明德先生相识于朋友介绍，婚礼只摆三桌。一生吵过架，却从未分开过夜。
blocks.en: She met Li Mingde through friends; their wedding had three tables. They argued, but never slept apart.

blocks.zh: 「他写字，我浇花 —— 这就是我们的共和国。」
blocks.en: "He wrote; I watered — that was our republic."

blocks.zh: 孙女小雨记得外婆教她辨认晨露与霜：「露水温柔，霜是冬天的信。」
blocks.en: Granddaughter Xiaoyu learned to tell dew from frost: "Dew is gentle; frost is winter's letter."

blocks.zh: 外孙浩然把外婆的园艺笔记扫描进纪念馆，标题写：「奶奶的科学。」
blocks.en: Haoran scanned her garden journals into the memorial, titled Grandma's Science.

blocks.zh: 2025年春，母亲在花季中离去。我们把她最爱的玫瑰瓣压在册页里，像把春天也留下。
blocks.en: She left in spring 2025, in blossom season. We pressed her favorite rose petals in these pages, keeping spring with us.

blocks.zh: 李家家书
blocks.en: Family letters

blocks.zh: 选编三十封
blocks.en: Thirty selected

blocks.zh: 本册选自李家五口四代通信，原件多为毛笔或钢笔，部分已扫描存于念归处纪念馆。
blocks.en: This volume draws on four generations of Li family correspondence, scanned and preserved on the Nianguichu memorial.

blocks.zh: 「华妹：火车已过黄河，北京冷，但心里热。勿念。明德」
blocks.en: "Meihua: The train has crossed the Yellow River. Beijing is cold, but my heart is warm. Do not worry. — Mingde"

blocks.zh: 「爸，样书到了。封面墨色正好，像您书房那方砚。周末带孩子们回去。」—— 李伟
blocks.en: "Dad, the proof arrived. The ink is just right, like your study stone. We'll bring the children home this weekend." — Wei

blocks.zh: 「爷爷：伦敦下雨，我读您推荐的《陶渊明集》。想家。小雨」
blocks.en: "Grandpa: Rain in London. I'm reading Tao Yuanming as you suggested. I miss home. — Xiaoyu"

blocks.zh: 「小雨：乡愁是功课，慢慢写。爷爷」
blocks.en: "Xiaoyu: Homesickness is homework — write it slowly. — Grandpa"

blocks.zh: 李明德先生辞世后，家人在抽屉里发现未寄出的明信片，背面只有一句：「谢谢你们做我的孩子。」
blocks.en: After Mr. Li passed, the family found an unsent postcard in his drawer: "Thank you for being my children."

blocks.zh: 数字版可于纪念馆下载；精装版支持定制烫金与家族谱系折页。
blocks.en: Digital PDF available from the memorial; print editions offer gold stamping and fold-out family trees.

samples.titleZh: 陈志远 · 桥梁与河流
samples.dedicationZh: 献给父亲陈志远 —— 他把一生交给了两岸的人
samples.dedicationEn: For our father Chen Zhiyuan — who gave his life to the people between shores

blocks.zh: 陈志远
blocks.en: Chen Zhiyuan

blocks.zh: 架桥铺路，渡人亦渡己
blocks.en: He built bridges—carrying others, and himself, across

blocks.zh: 父亲生于长江边，少年时常在码头看船。他说第一次看见钢索斜拉桥，便知道这辈子要站在高处看水。
blocks.en: Born beside the Yangtze, he watched ferries as a boy. The first cable-stayed bridge he saw decided his life: he would work where water meets sky.

blocks.zh: 参与七座大江大桥与无数乡村公路。他笔记本里记的不是里程，而是每一座桥下第一次通车的日期。
blocks.en: He helped build seven major river crossings and countless rural roads. His notebooks recorded not kilometers but the date each bridge first opened.

blocks.zh: 2024年夏，父亲在工地旁的小院离世。我们把他常戴的安全帽放在册页里，像留一段未完工的河。
blocks.en: He passed in 2024 in the courtyard near his last site. We pressed his hard hat into these pages like an unfinished river.

samples.titleZh: 林小玲 · 夜班的白光
samples.dedicationZh: 献给我们的母亲、护士长林小玲
samples.dedicationEn: For our mother, head nurse Lin Xiaoling

blocks.zh: 林小玲
blocks.en: Lin Xiaoling

blocks.zh: 疼要有人听见，才算被照顾
blocks.en: Pain must be heard to be cared for

blocks.zh: 小玲阿姨（母亲坚持我们叫她小玲）在夜班走廊走了四十年。她说护士的鞋跟声，是病人最安心的钟。
blocks.en: Mother asked us to call her Xiaoling, not "Mom" on the ward. For forty years her heels on the night corridor were the clock patients trusted.

blocks.zh: 下班回家后她仍为我们缝校服。女儿说：「妈，您已经缝了整座医院。」她笑：「那再加三件。」
blocks.en: After shifts she sewed our uniforms. "Mother, you've already stitched a whole hospital," her daughter said. She laughed: "Then three more."

blocks.zh: 2026年春，她在花季中离去。同事们在纪念馆点亮了三千余支电子烛，像又一班从未结束的夜班。
blocks.en: She left in spring 2026. Colleagues lit more than three thousand candles on the memorial—another shift that never ends.
